description_long: This bungalow features a broad, flat roof with a dark finish, extending well beyond the main structure to provide ample shade. The exterior walls are a mix of dark and medium gray stone or brick, with the front facade showcasing a large central door flanked by four octagonal windows arranged symmetrically. The side and rear facades have fewer windows, with the rear showing two tall, narrow windows and the side featuring three rectangular windows. The building sits on a tiled base, suggesting a paved patio or walkway surrounding it. Minimal landscaping is visible, with a small potted plant and a bush near the entrance, adding a touch of greenery.
description: A modern bungalow with a wide, flat roof, dark stone walls, and distinctive octagonal windows on the front facade, set on a tiled base.
description_view_0: The left side of the bungalow, showing a dark wall with two tall, narrow windows and minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: The rear view, featuring a plain gray wall with no windows or doors, and the tiled base extending around the structure.
description_view_2: The right side, displaying three rectangular windows with white frames and a textured gray wall.
description_view_3: The front view, highlighting the main entrance with a large central door, four octagonal windows, and some small plants near the entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front octagonal windows with asymmetrical side and rear windows
